hypothesis: Si–M alloys containing 10–25 at% of a late transition metal M whose metallic radius is 1.10–1.25× that of Si and whose electronegativity differs from Si by ≤0.3 form supporting sublattices that preserve Li+ migration channel radii within ±0.2 Å across full lithiation/delithiation and thereby limit volumetric expansion to <150% (versus ~300% in pure Si).
